name: emergency_box
description: Build a fully enclosed 1x1x2 box around yourself using oak_planks for protection and defense
parameters: z.object({material:z.string().default("oak_planks").describe("The block type to use for construction, e.g., oak_planks."),wallHeight:z.number().int().min(1).max(3).default(2).describe("Total height of the walls in blocks."),includeRoof:z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to place a ceiling block above the bot."),addDoor:z.boolean().default(false).describe("Whether to try using a door from inventory instead of a wall block at the front.")})

name: kite_and_shoot
description: Maintain distance from hostiles while using bow to attack from safety, retreating if they get too close
parameters: z.object({targetEntityId:z.union([z.number().int(),z.string().min(1)]).optional().describe("The hostile entity to kite. If omitted, the bot will target the nearest hostile."),preferredDistance:z.number().min(5).max(25).default(12).describe("The ideal distance to maintain when shooting."),retreatThreshold:z.number().min(3).max(20).default(8).describe("Distance that triggers a retreat if the hostile gets too close."),maxShots:z.number().int().min(1).max(20).default(5).describe("Stop after firing this many shots."),maxDurationMs:z.number().int().min(1000).max(60000).default(20000).describe("Stop kiting after this duration.")})
